description: We take care of our team so they can do their best work.

items.title: Health & Wellness
items.description: Comprehensive medical, dental, and vision insurance for you and your family.

items.title: Unlimited PTO
items.description: Take the time you need to recharge. We trust you to manage your schedule.

items.title: Equipment Budget
items.description: $3,000 annual stipend for your home office setup and productivity tools.

items.title: Learning & Development
items.description: $2,000 yearly budget for conferences, courses, and professional growth.
